name: Beaver Tail Ala Denny
recipeInstructions:
1. Place whole beaver tails on barbecue or oven broiler rack until the skin blisters.
2. Let cool in freezer compartment.
3. Remove cold blistered skin and discard.
4. Put white meat aside.
5. In a shallow roasting pan, sauté onion in butter until clear.
6. Stir in mustard to coat onions, then stir in Sherry, Tabasco sauce, and half of the Barbecue sauce, making sure the bottom of the pan is covered.
7. Spread out beaver tails in the pan, cover with remaining Barbecue sauce, sprinkle with cheese.
8. Bake in a 450-degree oven for 45 minutes.
9. Serve hot with wild or ordinary rice topped with generous spoonfuls of remaining sauce.
